title.rendered: [Webinar Recording] Emerging Social Media Trends for Nonprofits

content.rendered:
Final Presentation: Wednesday, August 9, 2023
Time: 90 minutes
Cost: $20 (USD)
Presented by: Heather Mansfield, Founder of Nonprofit Tech for Good

Social media tools and trends are always evolving, and to be successful on social media, nonprofits need to embrace a strategy of flexibility and early adoption. This 90-minute webinar explores emerging trends in social media and their potential impact on digital marketing and fundraising. Topics include:

  • The potential of social VR platforms in the Metaverse
  • The rise of streaming fundraisers on Twitch
  • An Introduction to Threads for Nonprofits
  • How Gen Z uses social media with a focus on TikTok
  • How to grow your following on social media

<<Buy Recording>>

This is the final webinar in a series of four required to earn a 2023 Certificate in Digital Marketing & Fundraising from Nonprofit Tech for Good.
